subcodes.first_line: O thou who art nigh unto the Court of Grandeur! Thou art remembered in this gathering and art known at the Sacred Threshold of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقربه درگاه کبریاء در این بساط مذکوری و در آستان مقدس جمال مبارک معروف و
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
